title: Gameplay Engineer – LLMs, Creator Tools & Narrative Systems
description:
As a Gameplay Engineer on Embark's Machine Learning team, you will help shape the future of storytelling tools and systems for video games.
   

  

 We believe modern AI can unlock entirely new creative workflows for narrative design, quest building, lore creation, and player-facing reactivity. Our goal is to investigate how we can design new tools and systems that enable creators to be more ambitious, collaborate more effectively, and explore ideas with less friction rather than simply automating existing workflows.
   

  

 In this role, you will build gameplay-facing systems, tools, and integrations that make AI useful in real production environments—practical, controllable, debuggable, and aligned with the creative vision. You'll work closely with writers, researchers, designers, and other engineers to explore different levels of AI agency to intentionally design where AI agency makes sense and where it doesn't.
   

  

 This is a role for someone who is excited about creative tooling, loves building things that people actually use, and is genuinely enthusiastic about what new AI techniques can enable in games.
   

  

**Example Of Responsibilities**
* Build gameplay systems and tools that enable new narrative workflows and faster iteration for creators
* Collaborate with designers and narrative teams to understand creative needs and turn them into intuitive tooling
* Develop engine integrations and "hooks" that expose the right information for analysis, validation, and experimentation
* Create debugging and diagnostics workflows that make complex systems understandable and easy to iterate on
* Work with writers and designers to explore and prototype AI-native gameplay mechanics that preserve authorial intent while enabling emergence and reactivity
* Prototype experimental features quickly, then help mature the best ideas into robust production-ready solutions
* Help design and evaluate different degrees of AI autonomy, balancing creative ambition, reliability, and control
* Help ensure AI-assisted workflows remain controllable, transparent, and human-driven
* Work across disciplines to integrate tools into real game development pipelines, not isolated demos


**We would love if you have**
* Strong gameplay engineering experience and excellent C++ skills
* Experience working in Unreal Engine
* A passion for tooling, iteration speed, and developer experience
* A creator mindset: you enjoy building systems that make other people more effective
* Comfort collaborating with designers and translating creative goals into technical solutions
* Professional English communication skills


**Additionally, It's a Bonus If You Have**
* Experience building editor tools or content workflows in Unreal Engine
* Familiarity with language models, AI tooling, evaluation, or "human-in-the-loop" creative systems
* Experience with narrative systems, quest pipelines, or other creator-driven game features
* Python experience, or interest in working across engine + services/tooling


 At Embark we offer competitive salaries, passionate colleagues to share knowledge with and much more, but most of all we invite you to take part of a journey into the unknown, to build creative, surprising and beautiful experiences together.
   

  

 We welcome game makers of all sex, class, colour, age, gender identity, education, religion, opinion, culture, nation of origin, language, sexual orientation, shape, size, and ability.
   

  

 Did we leave anyone out? Well, we welcome you, too! We think that the gaming industry is made better when everyone has a seat at the table.
   

  

 Be yourself at Embark and make games while doing so. Please apply with confidence. We can’t wait to hear from you (in English)!

title: Utvecklare till digitaliseringsavdelningen
description:
**Sektionen för systemutveckling, RK IT-utveckling, Digitaliseringsavdelningen, Förvaltningsavdelningen**
 Har du flerårig erfarenhet av system- och applikationsutveckling och trivs att arbeta problemlösande med fokus på kvalitet och prestanda? Vi söker en utvecklare och erbjuder nu en spännande roll mitt i händelsernas centrum.
   

  

**Din arbetsdag. Sveriges morgondag.**
 Som utvecklare på sektionen för systemutveckling skapar du tillsammans med teamet moderna användarvänliga lösningar som verkligen gör skillnad i vardagen för myndighetens medarbetare. Sektionen består av medarbetare och 18 externa konsulter.
   

  

 Ditt arbete kommer innebära att säkerställa daglig drift av ETL-jobb inklusive felsökning och rättningar. Du arbetar med att optimera SQL-script och lagrade procedurer. Vidare kommer du att dokumentera flöden och datalogik samt delta i tekniska möten och bidra med lösningsförslag. En del av arbetet innebär att genomföra vidareutveckling och ändringar utifrån verksamhetens behov, samt bidra till kvalitet och kontinuitet genom att utveckla enligt styrande regler och best practice. Du kommer operativt arbeta med att förbättra och vidareutveckla befintliga system och applikationer, samtidigt som du hjälper till att skapa nya lösningar som gör det lättare för verksamheten att fungera.
   

  

 Läs mer om vår verksamhet på www.regeringen.se.
   

  

**Din bakgrund**
 För att vara aktuell för denna roll behöver du uppfylla alla skallkrav och gärna även de meriterande kriterierna.
   

  

**Krav:**
* Akademisk examen inom relevant område eller annan utbildning som i kombination med arbetslivserfarenhet bedöms vara relevant för anställningen.
* Flerårig relevant och aktuell arbetslivserfarenhet av system- och applikationsutveckling.
* God erfarenhet i T-SQL (utveckling, felsökning och optimering av komplexa SQL-script och lagrade procedurer).
* God erfarenhet av att arbeta med ETL-processer (design, utveckling, förvaltning, scheduleringsverktyg, övervakning).
* God erfarenhet av förvaltning och incidenthantering i dataplattformsmiljöer
* God Kunskap i Microsoft SQL server (2016 och senare).
* Förståelse för datamodellering, datakvalitet och dataintegritet.
* Förmåga att dokumentera tekniska lösningar och bidra till kunskapsöverföring.
* Kunskap om versionshantering (tex Git) och agil arbetsmetodik.
* Kunskap om dataintegrationsprinciper och datastyrning (Data Governance).
* Goda kunskaper i muntlig och skriftlig framställning, både på svenska och engelska.


**Meriterande:**
* Utbildning inom data och systemvetenskap.
* Erfarenhet av datalagerlösningar och BI-verktyg.
* Erfarenhet från offentlig sektor och/eller stora organisationer med komplex datamiljö.
* Arbetat i agila projekt (Scrum).


**Dina egenskaper**
 Regeringskansliets medarbetarkriterier är helhet, utveckling, resultat. Alla som arbetar i Regeringskansliet behöver ha helhetssyn och samarbeta för verksamhetens bästa. Du förväntas bidra med ditt perspektiv och din kompetens samt vara öppen för andras. Du kommer med idéer och nya angreppssätt för att förbättra och utveckla verksamheten och din egen kompetens. Du är inriktad på resultat i ditt agerande och anpassar dig när behov och inriktning ändras.
   

  

 I denna roll arbetar du strukturerat och självgående. Du är problemlösande med fokus på kvalitet och prestanda. Du är kommunikativ i tekniska dialoger samt med verksamhetsföreträdare. Stor vikt kommer att läggas vid dina personliga egenskaper.
   

  

 Läs mer på Medarbetarskap och ledarskap i Regeringskansliet - Regeringen.se
   

  

**Övrigt**
 Tjänsten är en tillsvidareanställning och inleds med sex månaders provanställning. Tillträde enligt överenskommelse.
   

  

 Arbetsort är i centrala Stockholm. Vi erbjuder 40% distansarbete när verksamheten tillåter.
   

  

 Befattningen är placerad i säkerhetsklass och en säkerhetsprövning med registerkontroll kommer att genomföras innan beslut om anställning fattas.
   

  

**Är du intresserad?**
 Vill du veta mer om jobbet och vad vi erbjuder, kontakta Jim Williams som är sektionschef, på 070-3372983. Du är också välkommen att kontakta rekryteringsspecialist Albin Törnblad för frågor kring rekryteringsprocessen. Fackliga kontaktpersoner är Johan Strokirk för Saco och Jan Wahlström för ST. Du når samtliga via Regeringskansliets växel, 08-405 10 00. Vi tar gärna emot samtal från dig som är intresserad av jobbet men vi tackar nej till dig som säljer annonser och rekryteringstjänster.
   

  

 Välkommen att registrera din ansökan i vårt rekryteringsverktyg
 **senast den 23 mars 2026.**
 Regeringskansliets uppdrag är att stödja regeringen i dess arbete med att styra Sverige och förverkliga sin politik. Här arbetar 4 800 personer, varav 600 utomlands. Regeringskansliet välkomnar sökande med olika bakgrund och erfarenheter. Vi ser jämställdhet och mångfald som en styrka och tillgång och vi arbetar aktivt för att vara en arbetsplats fri från diskriminering. Förvaltningsavdelningen ansvarar för myndighetsövergripande frågor som förändrings- och förnyelsearbete, ekonomi, arbetsgivarfrågor, kompetensförsörjning, kommunikation, säkerhet, it, bibliotek, arkiv och registratur samt för den gemensamma servicen i Regeringskansliet.

title: Senior Robotics Software Engineer (Spacer Robotics)
description:
We're seeking a
 **Senior Robotics Software Engineer** 
 to join the core team building Spacer's
   

  

 production-level robot. This is a highly hands-on, multidisciplinary role spanning the full
   

  

 autonomy stack - from raw sensor data through perception, localization, planning, and control.
   

  

 You'll be a technical self-starter who thrives with broad ownership, can make sound architectural
   

  

 decisions independently, and is energized by building real systems on physical hardware in
   

  

 unstructured environments. As an early hire, you'll shape our engineering culture and leave a
   

  

 lasting mark on how our robots think, see, and move.
   

  

**Spacer Robotics** 
 is building autonomous, non-humanoid robotic systems to construct infrastructure in extreme environments—from lunar bases to next-gen terrestrial job sites. Our vision is to disrupt the $16 trillion global construction industry by pioneering a new Deep Tech philosophy that blends robotics, AI, and systems engineering at the frontier.
   

  

**Location & Relocation:** 
 Please note that this is an on-site role located in the
 **San Francisco Bay Area, USA** 
 . Relocation will be required. Spacer Robotics is open to supporting relocation and visa processes for qualified candidates.
   

  

****About You:****
* 4+ years of professional software engineering experience.
* Strong C++ (performance-focused) and solid Python skills.
* Hands-on experience with ROS and physical robotic platforms.
* Experience integrating sensors (cameras, LiDAR, IMUs, encoders).
* Background in motion planning, kinematics, or control systems.
* Comfortable debugging across hardware, firmware, and software.
* Excited to work hands-on with real robots in unstructured environments.


****What You’ll Do:****
* 4+ years of professional software engineering experience.
* Strong C++ (performance-focused) and solid Python skills.
* Hands-on experience with ROS and physical robotic platforms.
* Experience integrating sensors (cameras, LiDAR, IMUs, encoders).
* Background in motion planning, kinematics, or control systems.
* Comfortable debugging across hardware, firmware, and software.
* Excited to work hands-on with real robots in unstructured environments.
* Willing to relocate to the San Francisco Bay Area.


****What You’ll Do:****
* Develop and maintain our ROS-based software for real-time motion and coordination.
* Build and optimize embedded C++ systems for low-latency, reliable operation.
* Integrate cameras, LiDAR, IMUs, and encoders into robust perception and feedback loops.
* Work closely with hardware engineers to debug, calibrate, and optimize the full robotic system.
* Implement motion planning, kinematics, and control algorithms.
* Build production-ready monitoring, diagnostics, and update infrastructure for robots operating in demanding outdoor construction environment.


 The US base salary range for this full-time position is between $140,000 - $230,000 annually. The pay offered for this position may vary based on several individual factors, including job-related knowledge, skills, and experience.
   

  

 Competitive equity, depending on experience and role level. As one of our early engineering hires, your equity stake will be meaningful and reflect the impact you'll have on building our technology from the ground up.
   

  

 The total compensation package may also include additional components/benefits depending on the specific role. This information will be shared if an employment offer is extended.

title: System Developer
description:

 Location: Stockholm, Sweden (Office in Sundbyberg)

title: Cloud Engineer
description:
So, are you ready to redefine the financial industry? Does a serious technical challenge make your heart beat faster? Do you give energy to those who work with you, and are you looking for an energy-boosting work environment? Then Nordnet is the place for you!
   

  

**About The Role**
 Nordnet is rebuilding the bank on Google Cloud Platform. Not lift-and-shift. Not partial migration. A full architectural transformation.
   

  

 The Cloud Platform team builds and operates the mission-critical foundation that all product teams rely on: robust infrastructure, golden paths, Terraform modules, developer experience, reliability guardrails, and cloud best practices.
   

  

 We’re looking for engineers with strong development backgrounds (Java or Golang preferred) who have transitioned into cloud engineering and want to work at the platform layer, building scalable infrastructure that enables hundreds of engineers to move fast, safely.
   

  

 This role combines software engineering discipline with infrastructure depth. If you enjoy turning complexity into reusable patterns and building platforms that scale people, this job is for you.
   

  

**What Will You Do**
 In this role, you’ll collaborate closely with product and platform teams to:
   

  

* Design and evolve Nordnet’s cloud platform on GCP.
* Develop and maintain Terraform modules and opinionated “golden paths.”
* Create secure and scalable patterns for CloudSQL, networking, IAM, Kubernetes, observability, and more.
* Improve the developer experience around infrastructure provisioning.
* Strengthen reliability, automation, and operational maturity.
* Contribute to standards and support teams in adopting them.


 You won’t be working in isolation; much of the work involves discussion, refinement, and shared ownership.
   

  

**As a Cloud Engineer At Nordnet, You**
* Are an experienced engineer (typically 5+ years in software development).
* Have built production systems in Java or Golang.
* Have experience working with cloud infrastructure in one of the major providers (GCP, AWS, or Azure).
* Understand distributed systems and how they behave under failure.
* Care about automation, CI/CD, and infrastructure as code.
* Communicate clearly and enjoy working with others to find pragmatic solutions.


*You don’t need to tick every box. If you have a passion for building cloud platforms, we encourage you to apply!*
**Experience That Will Help You Succeed**
* Terraform or similar infrastructure-as-code tools.
* Kubernetes in production.
* IAM and cloud security design.
* Networking in cloud environments.
* Observability (metrics, logging, alerting).
* CI/CD pipelines.
* Designing highly available systems.


**What We Offer**
* A collaborative environment where learning is continuous.
* Meaningful technical challenges to tackle together with experienced colleagues.
* Opportunities to grow as an engineer and/or leader.
* Competitive salary and compensation.


 As a Nordnetter, you are a pragmatic collaborator who thrives on open feedback and values simple, maintainable solutions. You enjoy working closely with internal customers and always prioritize systemic thinking over isolated tasks to ensure a holistic impact.
   

  

**Who We Are**
 Nordnet was founded to redefine the financial world by giving power back to the customers. Our journey has just begun, and our vision is simple: to make our customers the best investors they can be.
   

  

 With 900 colleagues across the Nordics, we value open communication, creativity, and a flat organization where every effort counts. Our culture is built on passion, simplicity, and transparency. Here, anyone can talk to anyone, and we take pride in a warm atmosphere where great technology is pivotal to our success.
   

  

**Visit us:** 
 nordnetab.com | nordnet.se | nordnet.no | nordnet.dk | nordnet.fi
   

  

**Applications & Questions**
 If you have any questions, please contact Talent Acquisition Partner Linnea Liljedahl at Linnea.liljedahl@nordnet.se.
   

  

 Please note that Nordnet conducts credit and background checks on the final candidate as part of our recruitment process.
   

  

**We look forward to receiving your application!**

title: Experienced Integration Developer (D365 F&O)
description:
Choosing Capgemini means choosing a company where you will be empowered to shape your career in the way you’d like, where you’ll be supported and inspired by a collaborative community of colleagues around the world, and where you’ll be able to reimagine what’s possible.
   

  

 At Packaged Based Solutions (PBS) Nordics, a Capgemini unit, we specialize in ERP transformation for public and private sectors, using platforms like SAP, Microsoft Dynamics, and IFS to help organizations achieve operational excellence and strategic growth. With a strong Nordic presence and a diverse global client base, we guide clients through seamless ERP transformations that deliver lasting value.
   

  

 Join us and help the world’s leading organizations unlock the value of technology and build a more sustainable, inclusive world!
   

  

**Your role**
 As an Experienced D365 Finance & Operations (F&O) Integration Developer, you’ll take on a hands-on technical role focused on leading, designing and implementing integration solutions within the Microsoft Dynamics 365 F&O ecosystem. You’ll contribute to shaping our integration strategy, ensuring alignment with enterprise architecture standards, and driving innovation through the adoption of modern Microsoft technologies.
   

  

*In this role you will play a key role in:*
* Developing and managing integrations between Dynamics 365 F&O and third-party systems using Azure services, APIs, and other integration tools to ensure seamless data flow and system interoperability.
* Collaborating with stakeholders to gather business requirements and translating them into scalable technical designs, including customizations, integrations, and data migrations.
* Leading the development team in designing and implementing Dynamics 365 F&O solutions, ensuring adherence to best practices and high-quality standards.


**Your profile**
* At least 7 years of technical experience working with Microsoft Dynamics 365 F&O or as a X++ developer with proven hands-on experience developing in X++
* Fluency in Swedish and strong verbal and written communication skills in English
* Experience in solution design with technical leadership experience and stakeholder collaboration
* Working experience from implementation and support projects
* A solid understanding of business processes and practices, with the ability to evaluate system gaps and recommend improvements
* An ability to turn functional requirements into technical designs previously involved in full life-cycle projects


*Note: You need to be based in Sweden and proficiency in Swedish to be considered for the role.*
**What We Believe You Will Enjoy About Working Here**
* Freedom to shape your work, manage your time with hybrid flexibility, and have the space to be creative, innovate, and make a real difference.
* A variety of social and wellness activities, from sports and health programs to cultural events and art initiatives, designed to bring employees together and enrich work life.
* An inspiring environment where you can accelerate your growth through continuous learning, professional certifications, and world-class programs from Udemy, Harvard Manager Mentor, and our trusted partner learnings. Collaborate with a nordic and global network of experts, gain cutting-edge insights, and stay ahead in the latest technologies and business practices.
* An extensive benefits package, including parental benefits, occupational and flex pension, private insurance, preventive healthcare, and more.


**Application**
*In this recruitment process, we review applications and hire on an ongoing basis.* 
*As part of our recruitment process, identity verification will be conducted through inspection of your ID card, and background checks may be carried out as required.*
**About Capgemini**
 Capgemini is an AI-powered global business and technology transformation partner, delivering tangible business value. We imagine the future of organizations and make it real with AI, technology and people. With our strong heritage of nearly 60 years, we are a responsible and diverse group of 420,000 team members in more than 50 countries. We deliver end-to-end services and solutions with our deep industry expertise and strong partner ecosystem, leveraging our capabilities across strategy, technology, design, engineering and business operations. The Group reported 2024 global revenues of €22.1 billion.
   

  

**Make it real |** 
**www.capgemini.com**

title: Senior Game Developer
description:
Ready to shape how our games feel, scale, and perform - from first prototype to shipped title?
 



  





**Bandit Island Games** 
  is a Stockholm-based game dev studio focusing on social, couch-play experiences.
 



  





 We develop both 
 **traditional PC titles** 
  and 
 **dual-screen games** 
  (phone as controller) for Steam and streaming services.
 



 We work on our own IPs alongside projects for major publishers.
 



  





 We are looking for a 
 **Senior Game Developer** 
  who thrives in a prototyping-heavy environment and wants to build features across our PC and dual-screen titles.
 



  





 You'll act as a core technical pillar within one of our game teams and help shape shared technology and engineering practices across the studio.
 



  





 What you'll work on:
 


* **Systems Architecture & Prototyping:** 
  Moving quickly from "what if" to a playable build. You’ll architect and develop everything from core gameplay loops to meta-systems.
* **Collaborative Problem Solving:** 
  We're a lean team where everyone helps out. Expect tight feedback loops with designers. You’ll ship fast, test aggressively, and iterate. You jump in wherever needed to help the team ship.
* **Cross-Platform Performance:** 
 Build high-performance systems for PC and cloud streaming while optimizing our mobile controller tech.



  





 Who you are:
 


* **Technical Depth:** 
  Professional experience in C# and Unity. You understand how to write performance-critical code for both mobile and desktop environments.
* **Pragmatic Mindset:** 
 You can prototype quickly to test ideas, then build for production when it matters. You communicate clearly about technical trade-offs and help the team solve problems without overthinking them.
* **Natural Mentor:** 
  You enjoy sharing battle-tested knowledge and helping the rest of the team level up.
* **Networking experience:** 
  You're familiar with client-server architecture, state synchronization patterns, or working within custom networking frameworks.



  





**Not a 100% match? Please apply anyway!** 




 We care more about how you think and work than a perfect resume. If you're a solid developer who wants to ship great games, let's talk.
 



  





**About us** 




 Bandit Island Games is redefining how people play together. We create unforgettable, IP-driven experiences and original games that bring friends and families together, whether on the couch or across the globe. With Dual Screen gameplay at our core, we're not just making games, we're building worlds that inspire connection, laughter, and endless fun.

title: Senior Backend Engineer [node.js]
description:
**Job Description**
 We're looking for a Senior Node.js Developer who builds with AI as a first principle—not as an afterthought. You'll design and build APIs from the ground up, modernize legacy .NET services into Node, and architect BFF and API gateway layers that scale. You'll work alongside AI tooling daily, using agentic programming practices to accelerate everything from problem diagnosis to code generation.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
**What You'll Actually Do**
* Build Node.js APIs from scratch—designing schemas, defining contracts, implementing business logic, and owning the full lifecycle
* Analyze existing .NET services, understand their behavior, and rebuild them in Node with improved architecture
* Design and implement Backend-for-Frontend (BFF) layers and API gateways using REST patterns
* Integrate AI tooling into your workflow for understanding codebases, planning technical work, and executing through agentic coding practices
* Collaborate with teams to define API standards, error handling patterns, and documentation practices
* Review code, mentor developers, and contribute to engineering culture


**The AI Aspect**
 This is non-negotiable, you need to be actively exploring where AI can eliminate tedious work. We expect you to experiment with AI tools, identify opportunities to automate repetitive tasks, and push the boundaries of what you can delegate. If you're not regularly discovering new ways to make AI do the boring parts, you're not the right fit.
   

  

**Qualifications**
**What We're Looking For**
**Required**
* 5+ years of production Node.js experience, with deep understanding of async patterns, event loops, and performance optimization
* Proven experience building REST APIs from scratch—not just consuming them
* Experience designing BFF architectures or API gateways
* Familiarity with AI-assisted development tools (Copilot, Claude, Cursor, or similar) and a genuine interest in pushing these tools further
* Strong opinions on API design


**Preferred**
* Ability to read and understand .NET/C# codebases well enough to translate business logic into Node
* Experience with agentic coding tools (Claude Code, Cursor, or similar)
* Background in migrating legacy systems to modern stacks
* Understanding of authentication patterns (OAuth, JWT, API keys)
* Extensive experience with Kubernetes
* Good to Have
* React, Next.js, or Angular experience
* Python proficiency
* Exposure to GraphQL, gRPC, or event-driven architectures


**How You Work**
 You're comfortable using AI to accelerate your thinking—not just your typing. You use tools like Claude or Copilot to explore unfamiliar codebases, draft implementation plans, and generate boilerplate. But you also know when to step back and think without assistance. You're pragmatic about what AI can and can't do today.
   

  

 You don't wait for perfect requirements. You dig into legacy code, ask questions, and figure out what the system actually does versus what the documentation says.
   

  

 # Hybrid
   

  

**About Us**
**Our People, Our Culture**
 For more than 50 years, Verisk has helped property and casualty insurers make smarter decisions about risk through AI-powered risk modeling, advanced analytics, and technology solutions spanning the entire policy lifecycle. We are a leading strategic data, analytics, and technology partner to the global insurance industry, guided by core values of learning, caring, and results while maintaining the highest ethical standards as stewards of the industry's most comprehensive datasets. Learn more about Verisk and what we are doing within the insurance industry.
   

  

 When you join Verisk, you become part of a diverse global team with over 7,500 professionals in 30 plus countries, making work that matters. We're certified by Great Place to Work, reflecting our commitment to inclusivity, employee engagement, and wellbeing. At Verisk, your growth is a priority—from professional development and tuition benefits to a supportive, flexible workplace culture, we support your continued growth.
   

  

**Our Culture** 
 : Explore our inclusive, people-first culture that fosters innovation, collaboration, and belonging.
   

  

**Awards & Recognition** 
 : See why Verisk is consistently recognized as a Great Place to Work™ around the world.
   

  

**Our Businesses** 
 : Learn about the diverse industries we serve — from insurance and energy to financial services and beyond.
   

  

**Life at Verisk** 
 : Discover what it’s like to work at Verisk through employee stories, team highlights, and culture moments.
   

  

**Careers at Verisk** 
 : Join a global team of problem-solvers and innovators doing meaningful work that’s shaping the future of industries. Whether you're just starting out or looking to take your career to the next level, Verisk offers growth, purpose, and a people-first culture
   

  

 Let’s build something meaningful together!
   

  

 Verisk Analytics is an equal opportunity employer.
   

  

 All members of the Verisk Analytics family of companies are equal opportunity employers. We consider all qualified applicants for employment without regard to race, religion, color, national origin, citizenship, sex, gender identity and/or expression, sexual orientation, veteran's status, age or disability. Verisk’s minimum hiring age is 18 except in countries with a higher age limit subject to applicable law.
   

  

 At Verisk, we provide a competitive compensation package aligned with market benchmarks and individual experience, disclosed transparently in accordance with applicable pay transparency regulations. In addition to base salary, eligible roles may include a range of incentive opportunities designed based on market research and our internal grading structure.
   

  

 Our benefits portfolio varies by location; however, a typical package includes medical coverage, life insurance, pension plans, and paid time off in line with local labor laws.
   

  

 We also foster a work environment focused on well-being and career development. Additional perks may include wellness initiatives, fitness programs, and team-building activities.
   

  

 https://www.verisk.com/company/careers/
   

  

 Unsolicited resumes sent to Verisk, including unsolicited resumes sent to a Verisk business mailing address, fax machine, or email address, or directly to Verisk employees, will be considered Verisk property. Verisk will NOT pay a fee for any placement resulting from the receipt of an unsolicited resume.

title: Senior Software Engineer - Java
description:

* As a backend Java developer, you will work within a specific problem space critical to Klarna’s current needs where you will design, develop, and deploy backend services with a focus on scalability, high availability, and low latency.
* Collaborate and grow in a dynamic and autonomous environment while working in small, agile, and cross-functional teams.
