title: Software Engineers to Alva Labs
description:
**TL;DR**
 Alva Labs is looking for Software Engineers to help shape the future of hiring. In this role, you’ll work across their stack to build products that make hiring fair, predictive, and delightful — for everyone.
   

  

**Why Alva?**
 At Alva Labs, they’re redefining how companies hire — replacing gut feeling with science. They’re building an AI-first Hiring System: the only platform companies need to define roles, assess candidates, make confident decisions, and continuously improve their hiring.
   

  

 Instead of fragmented tools, they’re creating one cohesive system designed to make hiring accurate, fair, and scalable. Leading companies across Europe trust Alva Labs to make hiring more accurate, inclusive, and scalable.
   

  

 The team is a small, ambitious group based in Stockholm, Sweden. They value ownership, velocity, and low-ego collaboration. They care deeply about their craft and about each other — and they’re driven to build something that lasts.
   

  

 Joining now means being part of the growth journey as Alva Labs scales their product, explores new AI-powered capabilities, and brings fair hiring to millions more people.
   

  

**What They’re Looking For**
* Solid experience building and shipping products end-to-end
* Strong skills in modern frontend (React/TypeScript) and backend development (Python/Node.js)
* Solid understanding of software design principles and writing scalable, performant code
* Product mindset — you balance speed with long-term thinking and make well-reasoned decisions
* Collaborative spirit — you thrive in cross-functional teams with product, design, data, and ML


**What You’ll Do**
**In one sentence:** 
 Build the core Alva experience and take it to the next level.
   

  

* Design, build, and maintain features across the stack — frontend, backend, and infrastructure
* Take ownership of features end-to-end: from technical design to implementation, deployment, and iteration
* Collaborate closely with data scientists, designers, ML engineers, and product managers to turn ideas into intuitive product experiences
* Drive projects through the full lifecycle: planning, shipping, learning, and improving


**Tech Stack**
 They use tools that keep them fast, stable, and happy:
   

  

**Frontend:** 
 React, TypeScript
   

  

**Backend:** 
 Python, Node.js
   

  

**Infrastructure:** 
 Google Cloud Platform, Kubernetes, and various LLM providers
   

  

**Data & Analytics:** 
 Python, BigQuery, dbt
   

  

**DevOps & Tooling:** 
 GitHub, Terraform
   

  

**Questions and contact**
 Alva Labs is working with Amendo in this recruitment process. If you have any questions regarding this specific role, please contact Business Area Manager Johanna Hallenberg at johanna.hallenberg@amendo.se. Interviews are conducted on a rolling basis, so we encourage you to apply as soon as possible. Please submit your application in English, as it is the company language at Alva Labs
   

  

**About Amendo**
 Amendo is one of Sweden’s leading recruitment and consulting company, with a clear focus on accounting, banking, finance, insurance, IT, and tech roles and expertise. We help companies grow and people develop - we are your trusted and dedicated talent partner.
   

  

 Follow us on
 **Linkedin** 
 ,
 **Instagram** 
 and
 **Facebook** 
 .
   

  

 #IT
   

  

 Amendo har arbetat med framtidens kompetens sedan 2001 och är landets ledande konsult- och rekryteringsföretag inom ekonomi, bank, finans, försäkring, IT och tech. Vi är ett expansivt bolag verksamma över hela landet med lokala kontor i Stockholm, Göteborg och Örnsköldsvik.
   

  

 Vår vision att utveckla världen med kompetens når vi genom att arbeta nära våra kunder och kandidater, vara nyfikna på omvärlden - och hela tiden vilja framåt.
   

  

 Läs mer på amendo.se.

title: Lösningsarkitekt AI
description:
*Vill du vara med och forma framtidens AI-lösningar i en innovativ och teknikdriven miljö? Hos oss får du en nyckelroll som lösningsarkitekt AI där du är bryggan mellan affär och teknik. Vi är spjutspetsen inom AI på Länsförsäkringar och driver projekt med den allra senaste tekniken, som vår interna AI-assistent LF-GPT. Här får du möjlighet att påverka, utveckla och leda arbetet med skalbara, säkra AI-plattformar tillsammans med engagerade kollegor som älskar ny teknik och att diskutera nya idéer.*
**Om jobbet**
 Som Lösningsarkitekt AI ansvarar du för att utforma och leda utvecklingen av vår AI-plattform, med fokus på skalbarhet, säkerhet och återanvändbara lösningar. Du arbetar både strategiskt och praktiskt och är en viktig länk mellan affär och teknik. I rollen ingår att utveckla tekniska roadmaps och designprinciper, samtidigt som du coachar teamet och driver kompetenshöjning. Du rapporterar till Chef Data Science och samarbetar med ett tvärfunktionellt team bestående av bland annat data scientists, AI engineers, data engineers, fullstackutvecklare och DevOps. Hos oss får du arbeta med banbrytande AI-projekt som gör skillnad i hela Länsförsäkringar.
   

  

 Dina arbetsuppgifter kommer vara bland annat:
   

  

* Utforma och driva arkitektur- och plattformsstrategi, inklusive designprinciper, tekniska roadmaps och plattformsval
* Fokusera på återanvändbara komponenter, skalbarhet, säkerhet och kostnadseffektivitet
* Leda och genomföra proof-of-concepts, prototyper och referensimplementeringar
* Delta aktivt i kodning och säkerställa att arkitekturen fungerar i produktion
* Coacha teamet, genomföra kodgranskningar och etablera best practices inom CI/CD, IaC och MLOps
* Arrangera workshops och utbildningar för att höja teamets tekniska nivå
* Företräda AI-initiativ både internt och externt
* Sätta och följa upp riktlinjer för säkerhet, observability och arkitektur-KPI:er


 Följande kommer göra dig framgångsrik i denna tjänst:
   

  

* Högskoleutbildning inom datateknik, data science, matematik, elektronik eller liknande
* Flera års erfarenhet av mjukvaru- eller lösningsarkitektur, samt vana att leverera AI/ML-lösningar i produktion
* Erfarenhet av DevOps, CI/CD och containerteknik (t.ex. Kubernetes/Openshift)
* Erfarenhet av molnplattformar (Azure, AWS, GCP)
* God förståelse för säkerhets- och prestandaaspekter i distribuerade system
* Förståelse för Generativ AI och LLMs, inklusive prompting och prototypframtagning


 Meriterande är även om du har:
   

  

* Erfarenhet av agentbaserad AI och orkestreringsramverk
* Kännedom om LangChain, LLMOps, vector search/RAG och retrieval pipelines
* Branscherfarenhet från finans eller försäkring


 Som person är du nyfiken, lösningsorienterad och har lätt för att se helheten. Du trivs i en föränderlig miljö och har en stark vilja att driva utveckling framåt. Du är kommunikativ, samarbetsinriktad och har förmågan att inspirera och engagera andra i förändringsarbete. Eftersom AI-fältet utvecklas snabbt är du medveten om vikten av att ständigt tänka nytt och lära dig.
   

  

**Kontaktuppgifter:**
 Rekryterande chef: fredrik.urby@lansforsakringar.se
   

  

 Facklig representant Forena: susanne.hirsch2@lansforsakringar.se
   

  

 Facklig representant Akademikerföreningen: maria.eriksson@lansforsakringar.se
   

  

*Låter det spännande? Då vill vi veta mer om dig! Välkommen med din ansökan redan idag. Vi arbetar löpande med denna rekrytering och kan komma att tillsätta tjänsten innan sista ansökningsdag.*
**Vi vill informera dig som söker tjänst hos oss att vi under jul- och nyårshelgerna har begränsad bemanning. Det kan därför dröja något längre än vanligt innan du får återkoppling från oss. Vi tackar för din förståelse och ser fram emot att återkomma till dig så snart som möjligt efter julledigheten. God jul och gott nytt år!**
 Länsförsäkringar AB är en inkluderande arbetsplats där mod, möjligheter och engagemang står i centrum. Vi erbjuder ett hållbart arbetsliv med flexibla villkor och satsar på att alla medarbetare ska kunna växa och trivas, oavsett bakgrund.
   

  

 Affärsenhet Sak är länsförsäkringsgruppens drivkraft inom sakförsäkring. Vi utvecklar nya affärer, skapar smarta försäkringslösningar och ser till att kunderna alltid har trygghet i vardagen. Vi står bakom gemensamma koncept, digital försäljning och kundkommunikation – och vi kompletterar bolagens erbjudanden med specialprodukter som gör skillnad.
   

  

 Hos oss får du vara med och forma framtidens försäkring – där innovation möter samhällsnytta.

title: Servicetekniker till W5 Solutions
description:
**Vill du arbeta i en spännande miljö inom försvars- och säkerhetsindustrin? Trivs du med att jobba i en varierad och bred roll som servicetekniker där du ges möjlighet att resa och se dig om i Sverige och även utanför landets gränser? Perfekt, då är du rätt person för oss!** 




  





**Om W5 Solutions** 




 W5 Solutions är en ledande leverantör av avancerade system och lösningar för försvar, säkerhet och samhällsskydd. Bolaget stödjer svenska och internationella myndigheter samt industriella aktörer med teknologier och tjänster som stärker operativ förmåga inom tre affärsområden: Training, Power, och Integration. Denna roll tillhör affärsområde Training.
 



 Genom ett starkt fokus på innovation, kvalitet och hållbarhet levererar W5 Solutions skräddarsydda lösningar som möter högt ställda krav i kritiska miljöer. Verksamheten bygger på lång erfarenhet, teknisk expertis och ett starkt engagemang för kundernas långsiktiga framgång.
 



  





 Nu söker man en Servicetekniker för ett uppdrag på 12 månader med goda chanser till förlängning/överrekrytering. Bolaget har kontor i Norge, Stockholm, Junsele, Älmhult, Piteå och Finland och denna roll tar sin utgångspunkt i Stockholm (Solna) men du utför servicearbeten över nästintill hela landet. Du arbetar i ett team med fem andra servicetekniker från det svenska verksamhetsområdet Training men även med servicetekniker från annat affärsområde och ni är alltid minst två som åker ut på tilldelade uppdrag. Primärt är det W5:s träningsmiljöer i form av skjutbanor och skjutfält du servar i denna roll, utbildning av systembrukare ingår även i uppdraget - modern teknik och häftiga produkter! Bland kunderna finns primärt myndigheter och offentlig sektor så som Försvarsmakten och FMV, men också privata kunder så som skytte- och jaktföreningar.
 



  





***Du erbjuds:***



* Ett långsiktigt konsultuppdrag via A-hub med goda förmåner och chans till förlängning/överrekrytering
* En utvecklande tjänst på ett välmående och växande teknikbolag i framkant
* Möjligheter att resa både nationellt och internationellt
* Att bli en del av W5:s fantastiska företagskultur som präglas av samarbete, innovation och fart



  





**Arbetsuppgifter** 




 Som Servicetekniker har du en självständig och ansvarsfull roll där du primärt arbetar med serviceärenden ute hos kund men där du också hanterar serviceärenden internt i verkstaden och att stötta upp i bolagets produktion. Rollen är varierande och kombinerar praktiskt tekniskt arbete med planering, samordning och kunddialog.
 



 Du ansvarar för att:
 


* Utföra service, felsökning, reparationer och förebyggande underhåll
* Genomföra installationer och tekniska uppgraderingar
* Identifiera problem, analysera orsaker och leverera hållbara lösningsförslag
* Skapa och följa upp kundärenden samt säkerställa tydlig avrapportering
* Planera och koordinera serviceinsatser samt leda tekniker i fält vid projekt och uppdrag
* Samordna arbetstid och resurser inom servicefunktionen i samråd med servicekoordinator.
* Utbildning av brukare av W5 system.
* Stötta servicechef i planering och operativa frågor



 Rollen innebär resor i tjänsten (inkluderat övernattning och vanligt förekommande flera nätter i rad) och ett nära samarbete med både kunder och externa aktörer.
 



  





**Kravprofil** 




 Vi söker dig som har en stark teknisk grund och trivs i en roll med stort eget ansvar och kundkontakt.
 



 Vi ser att du har:
 


* Eftergymnasial teknisk utbildning eller motsvarande erfarenhet
* Minst 3 års erfarenhet av praktiskt tekniskt arbete inom service, underhåll eller installation
* Erfarenhet av självständigt arbete
* God teknisk förståelse och vana att arbeta strukturerat med felsökning
* God datorvana och kunskap i Microsoft Office 365
* B-körkort
* Mycket goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska
* Svenskt medborgarskap
* En livssituation som möjliggör mycket resande i tjänsten



 Som person är du ansvarstagande, lösningsorienterad och har en god social förmåga. Du är öppensinnad och bidrar till bolagets goda företagskultur. Du trivs med att arbeta nära kund, är en professionell ambassadör för W5 och är därutöver positiv till att resa i tjänsten.
 



  





**Meriterande:** 



* Militär bakgrund
* Jägarexamen
* Erfarenhet av teknisk service inom fordonsteknik
* Erfarenhet av system som Monitor G5 eller Jira Atlassian



  





**Övrig information** 




 Anställningsform: Konsultuppdrag, 12 månader
 



 Start: Enligt överenskommelse med hänsyn till uppsägningstid
 



 Omfattning: Heltid, måndag-fredag,
 



 Plats: Solna, Stockholm + resor
 



 Den här rekryteringsprocessen hanteras av A-hub, och mail angående tjänsten går genom A-hub. Ansök genom att klicka på "Ansök" nedan. Tänk på att vi lägger stor vikt vid din motivation och intresse för tjänsten. Vi tar inte emot ansökningar via mejl, men om du har specifika frågor om tjänsten kommer ansvarig rekryterare att svara på dem.
 



  





**Rekryteringsprocessen hos A-hub ser ut som följande** 



1. Löpande urval av CV
2. Telefonintervju med A-hub
3. Digital intervju med A-hub
4. Intervju hos företaget
5. Referenstagning
6. Utdrag ur belastningsregister
7. Erbjudande

title: Systemintegratör
description:
**Till vår kund Polismyndigheten söker vi efter en Systemintegratör, Kompetensnivå 3:**
 Polismyndighetens Integrationsgrupp i Stockholm ansvarar för integrationsplattformen. Gruppen behöver förstärkas med konsulter som har stor erfarenhet av integrationsutveckling inom IBM ACE. Uppdraget kommer att pågå en längre tid. Du kommer att arbeta med Polismyndighetens framtida plattform och dess integrationer. Integrationerna blir ofta komplexa och utmanande på grund av organisationens kontext. Du kommer att utföra integrationer samt föra dialog med olika intressenter för att tillsammans komma framåt med dess integrationer. Över tid kommer du som konsult att få mer ansvar kring våra olika integrationer när du växer in i rollen i vår grupp.
   

  

 Bifoga CV på Svenska.
   

  

**Kvalificeringskrav (Skallkrav):**
* Konsulten ska ha god förmåga att uttrycka sig i tal och skrift på svenska.
* Konsulten ska ha minst 5 års erfarenhet av integrationsutveckling med IBM ACE.
* Konsulten ska ha minst 5 års erfarenhet som Systemintegratör.


**Meriterande kompetens (Börkrav):**
* Konsulten bör ha erfarenhet av arbete inom den offentliga sektorn.
* Konsulten bör ha erfarenhet av liknande Dynamics-uppdrag inom större organisationer.
* Konsulten bör ha minst 3 års dokumenterad erfarenhet av arbete inom Dynamics 365 Finance and Operations och integrationer. Erfarenheten ska ha införskaffats de senaste 5 åren.
* Konsulten bör ha erfarenhet av liknande Dynamics-uppdrag.
* Konsulten bör ha erfarenhet av arbete inom rättsväsendet

title: Systemutvecklare .NET
description:
*Vill du arbeta med modern systemutveckling i ett team där kultur, utvecklingsmöjligheter och trygghet står i centrum? Hos oss får du möjlighet att påverka och driva utvecklingen framåt, samtidigt som du utvecklas både tekniskt och personligt. Vi söker dig som brinner för att skapa hållbara och kvalitativa lösningar – och vill vara en nyckelperson i vårt produktteam.*
**Om jobbet**
 Som Systemutvecklare .NET blir du en viktig del av vårt produktteam inom IT-utveckling, där vi arbetar agilt i tåget. Du ansvarar för att systemutvecklingen sker på ett kvalitativt och hållbart sätt, och bidrar till att utveckla ny funktionalitet och förbättra våra system. Du är med i hela processen – från krav till kod, test och deploy – och ser till att systemen är rätt utvecklade och underhållna. Hos oss får du en trygg arbetsmiljö, god stämning och stora möjligheter att utvecklas vidare.
   

  

 Dina arbetsuppgifter kommer vara bland annat:
   

  

* Arbeta med .NET Core (C# och VB.net) samt containerlösningar som OpenShift och Kubernetes.
* Hantera DevSecOps, CI/CD och infrastrukturtjänster för automatiserade, säkra och spårbara releasecykler.
* Utveckla backend och API-plattformar, samt bidra med fullstack-kompetens om du har det.
* Implementera molnlösningar, främst containerapps inom Azure Cloud.
* Använda Domain-Driven Design och clean code för att bygga modulära, lättunderhållna och skalbara system.
* Ta ägarskap över systemutvecklingen och driva den framåt tillsammans med teamet.
* Hjälpa till att förstå systemkrav, utveckla koden, testa och göra deploy till servrar.
* Underhålla applikationen efter implementation.


 Följande kommer göra dig framgångsrik i denna tjänst:
   

  

* Akademisk examen inom datavetenskap.
* Minst 5 års relevant arbetslivserfarenhet efter examen.
* Gedigen erfarenhet av .NET Core (C# och VB.net).
* Erfarenhet av containerlösningar som OpenShift och Kubernetes.
* God kunskap inom DevSecOps, CI/CD och infrastrukturtjänster för automatiserad integration och leverans.
* Erfarenhet av backend-utveckling och API-plattformar.
* Förståelse för digitala teknologier och plattformar, särskilt inom AI och containerapps inom Azure Cloud
* Förmåga att tillämpa Domain-Driven Design och skriva clean code för modulära och skalbara system.


 Meriterande är även om du har:
   

  

* Fullstack-kompetens.
* Kunskap om affärsmodeller, kundbehov och marknadstrender.
* Förmåga att fatta beslut baserat på experiment och data.
* Erfarenhet av agila utvecklingsmetoder och samarbete i tvärfunktionella team.
* Vidareutveckling av digitala lösningar som bidrar till tillväxt, stabilitet och pålitlighet.
* Förmåga att utforma system och tjänster utifrån kunders behov och beteenden.


 Som person har du starkt självledarskap och är en lagspelare som trivs i en miljö där samarbete och öppen dialog är självklara delar av vardagen. Du är kommunikativ, hjälpsam och lyhörd, med utmärkt analytisk förmåga och högt engagemang. Du har förmåga att inspirera och motivera team och organisation genom förändring, och använder teknik som ett verktyg för innovation och kreativitet. Du är drivande och prestigelös och bidrar aktivt till att utveckla både dig själv och verksamheten.
   

  

**Kontaktuppgifter:**
 Rekryterande chef: katerina.georgiadou@lansforsakringar.se
   

  

 Facklig representant Forena: susanne.hirsch2@lansforsakringar.se
   

  

 Facklig representant Akademikerföreningen: bitte.franzen-molander@lansforsakringar.se
   

  

*Låter det spännande? Då vill vi veta mer om dig! Välkommen med din ansökan redan idag. Vi arbetar löpande med denna rekrytering och kan komma att tillsätta tjänsten innan sista ansökningsdag.*
 Länsförsäkringar AB är en inkluderande arbetsplats där mod, möjligheter och engagemang står i centrum. Vi erbjuder ett hållbart arbetsliv med flexibla villkor och satsar på att alla medarbetare ska kunna växa och trivas, oavsett bakgrund.
   

  

 Fondliv är Länsförsäkringsgruppens fondförsäkringsbolag och en ledande aktör inom pensionssparande, särskilt inom tjänstepension. Vår verksamhet präglas av ett starkt kundfokus och ett målmedvetet arbete för att leverera trygga och kvalitativa sparlösningar. Hos oss är du med och bidrar till att människor får det pensionsliv de önskar – ett arbete som verkligen gör skillnad.
   

  

 Digital Utveckling inom Fondliv är en gruppering som tror på digitalisering genom utveckling och att det är nödvändigt för att förenkla och förbättra arbetsprocesser. Men det är också en möjlighet att skapa skräddarsydda och sömlösa kundupplevelser genom digitala kanaler vilket förbättrar kundnöjdhet och lojalitet. Vi vill skapa nya möjligheter för innovation, affärsutveckling och anpassningsförmåga. Vi vill kunna leverera bättre produkter, erbjudanden, tjänster och kundupplevelser jämfört med våra konkurrenter!
   

  

 Vill du vara med och forma framtidens pensionslösningar? Hos Fondliv får du chansen att växa, utvecklas och göra skillnad – varje dag.

title: Embedded Linux Senior Software Engineer - Optimisation
description:
Work across the full Linux stack from kernel through GUI to optimise Ubuntu, the world's most widely used Linux desktop and server, for the latest silicon.
   

  

 The role is a fast-paced, problem-solving role that's challenging yet very exciting. The right candidate must be resourceful, articulate, and able to deliver on a wide variety of solutions across PC and IoT technologies. Our teams partner with specialist engineers from major silicon companies to integrate next-generation features and performance enhancements for upcoming hardware.
   

  

**Location:** 
*This is a Globally remote role*
 What your day will look like
   

  

* Design and implement the best Ubuntu integration for the latest IoT and server-class hardware platforms and software stacks
* Work with partners to deliver a delightful, optimised, first class Ubuntu experience on their platforms
* Take a holistic approach to the Ubuntu experience on partner platforms with inputs on technical plans, testing strategy, quality metrics
* Participate as technical lead on complex customer engagements involving complete system architectures from cloud to edge
* Help our customers integrate their apps, SDKs, build device OS images, optimize applications with Ubuntu Core, Desktop and Server
* Work with the most advanced operating systems and application technologies available in the enterprise world.


 Joining Canonical, you will partner with bright minds from all over the world, and work with an exciting set of new technologies in a fast growing company with a truly unique and ambitious vision to build a better platform with free software. You will work with customers on exciting IoT and server platforms and technologies, built to support different verticals: from robots to data centers, from telco to retail.
   

  

 What we are looking for in you
   

  

* You love technology and working with brilliant people
* You have a Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, STEM or similar
* You have experience with Linux packaging (Debian, RPM, Yocto)
* You have experience working with open source communities and licences
* You have experience working with C, C++
* You can work in a globally distributed team through self-discipline and self-motivation.


**Additional Skills That You Might Also Bring**
* Experience with graphics stacks
* Good understanding of networking - TCP/IP, DHCP, HTTP/REST
* Basic understanding of security best practices in IoT or server environments
* Good communication skills, ideally public speaking experience
* IoT / Embedded experience – from board and SoC, BMCs, bootloaders and firmware to OS, through apps and services
* Some experience with Docker/OCI containers/K8s


 What we offer you
   

  

 Your base pay will depend on various factors including your geographical location, level of experience, knowledge and skills. In addition to the benefits above, certain roles are also eligible for additional benefits and rewards including annual bonuses and sales incentives based on revenue or utilisation. Our compensation philosophy is to ensure equity right across our global workforce.
   

  

 In addition to a competitive base pay, we provide all team members with additional benefits, which reflect our values and ideals. Please note that additional benefits may apply depending on the work location and, for more information on these, you can ask in the later stages of the recruitment process.
   

  

* Fully remote working environment - we've been working remotely since 2004!
* Personal learning and development budget of 2,000USD per annum
* Annual compensation review
* Recognition rewards
* Annual holiday leave
* Parental Leave
* Employee Assistance Programme
* Opportunity to travel to new locations to meet colleagues at 'sprints'
* Priority Pass for travel and travel upgrades for long haul company events


**About Canonical**
 Canonical is a pioneering tech firm that is at the forefront of the global move to open source. As the company that publishes Ubuntu, one of the most important open source projects and the platform for AI, IoT and the cloud, we are changing the world on a daily basis. We recruit on a global basis and set a very high standard for people joining the company. We expect excellence - in order to succeed, we need to be the best at what we do.
   

  

 Canonical has been a remote-first company since its inception in 2004. Work at Canonical is a step into the future, and will challenge you to think differently, work smarter, learn new skills, and raise your game. Canonical provides a unique window into the world of 21st-century digital business.
   

  

 Canonical is an equal opportunity employer
   

  

 We are proud to foster a workplace free from discrimination. Diversity of experience, perspectives, and background create a better work environment and better products. Whatever your identity, we will give your application fair consideration.

title: Nordic Marketing Intern
description:
Arlo Europe, part of Verisure, is seeking a passionate and high-energy
 **Nordic Marketing Intern** 
 to
 **support marketing activities** 
 across the Nordic region. In this role, you will act as a key coordination point between Arlo, our retail partners, and internal teams.
 







 You will be based at our
 **office in Solna** 
 . We offer a
 **hybrid working model** 
 , with three days in the office and two days working from home.
 







 Arlo Europe is a technology-driven smart home security company combining hardware, AI, and cloud services to create innovative solutions used by millions of customers across Europe.
 







**Your Key Responsibilities** 








 You will
 **support the Nordic Marketing Manager** 
 in executing marketing activities, ensuring high-quality content, flawless campaign rollouts, and impactful local market activations.
 







 You will help
 **run digital marketing campaigns** 
 ,
 **support in-store activations** 
 , and
 **assist in organizing local events** 
 . You will
 **collaborate closely** 
 with the sales team, the central marketing organization, agencies, and external partners to drive demand, brand visibility, and commercial success
 







**Market & Growth Support** 



* Support the Marketing Manager on demand generation initiatives, 360° marketing campaigns, strategic partner campaigns, and new product introductions (NPI)
* Manage product pages with retailers, ensuring a seamless customer experience and relevant messaging across the customer journey
* Track campaign performance and ROI, providing insights and optimization recommendations







**Campaign & Channel Execution** 



* Coordinate digital marketing activities across retailer websites (web banners, newsletters, sponsored products) from briefing to execution
* Assist with in-store activations, including packaging and shelf design, ensuring flawless execution
* Coordinate and assist with ratings and reviews collection and syndication across key retail partners







**Localization & Content Adaptation** 



* Coordinate or provide local translations of marketing materials for Nordic markets
* Ensure brand consistency while tailoring content to local market requirements







**Reporting & Administration** 



* Conduct competitor analyses and prepare actionable insights







**What We Offer**



* A hands-on internship where you will work on real marketing campaigns across the Nordic region
* The opportunity to gain experience in digital marketing, retail marketing, and product launches
* A dynamic and entrepreneurial environment, combining the agility of a startup with the strength of the Verisure group
* Close collaboration with experienced marketing professionals in an international team
* A hybrid working model with flexibility between office and home
* A brand-new office in Solna starting summer 2026







**Who You Are**








 You are studying Marketing, Digital Marketing, Communication, or a related fields at a university or vocational college (YH).
 







 Competencies and Skills we’re looking for:
 


* **Digital marketing fundamentals:** 
 you understand campaign planning, performance tracking and social media.
* **Project coordination:** 
 you are able to manage multiple tasks, meet deadlines, and follow processes from briefing to execution.
* **Strong written and verbal communication in English** 
 and preferably Swedish, including basic copywriting and translation/localization abilities.
* **Analytical mindset** 
 : you are comfortable with tracking campaign performance, interpreting data, and proposing optimizations.
* **Team collaboration:** 
 you will work closely with marketing managers, sales teams, and external partners.
* **Adaptability & initiative** 
 : you are capable of learning quickly, following guidance, and taking ownership of assigned tasks.
* **Strong fit with our Company DNA**











 It’s a nice-to-have:
 


* Previous experience in marketing, social media or e-commerce.
* Familiarity with smart home industry and natural tech savvy
* Interest
 **in the consumer electronics or tech sector.**

title: Senior PEGA Developer / Lead System Architect
description:
We are seeking a highly skilled
 **Senior PEGA Developer / Lead System Architect** 
 with 10+ years of experience to join our growing technology team in
 **Stockholm, Sweden** 
 . You will play a critical role in the design, development, and implementation of enterprise-scale PEGA solutions, working closely with stakeholders, architects, and cross-functional teams.
 



  




**Key Responsibilities** 
1. Lead the end-to-end design and delivery of PEGA applications, ensuring alignment with enterprise architecture.
2. Collaborate with business analysts and product owners to translate business requirements into scalable PEGA solutions.
3. Define application layers, rule sets, case types, integrations, and UI strategies.
4. Lead and mentor a team of PEGA developers, ensuring adherence to PEGA best practices and guardrails.
5. Optimize performance using PEGA tools (PAL, DB Tracer, SMA, AES/PEGA Autonomic Event Services).
6. Integrate PEGA applications with REST/SOAP APIs, databases, and external systems.
7. Participate in code reviews, design reviews, and architecture discussions.
8. Ensure secure coding practices and compliance with internal and regulatory standards.
9. Support deployment and DevOps automation for PEGA applications using PEGA Deployment Manager, Jenkins, or similar tools.
10. Contribute to solution architecture, documentation, and ongoing support.



  




**Required Skills and Experience** 
1. 10+ years of hands-on PEGA experience with deep understanding of PRPC architecture.
2. Strong knowledge of case management, declarative rules, decisioning, data pages, activities, and integrations.
3. Experience with PEGA v7.x to v8.x or PEGA Infinity platform.
4. PEGA LSA (Lead System Architect) certification is
 **highly preferred** 
 .
5. Expertise in system design, object-oriented development, and service-oriented architecture (SOA).
6. Hands-on experience with REST/SOAP integrations and data exchange patterns.
7. Experience working in Agile/Scrum delivery environments.
8. Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, with ability to troubleshoot complex issues.
9. Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills.



  




**Nice to Have** 
1. Experience with PEGA Customer Decision Hub (CDH), PEGA Marketing, or PEGA Customer Service.
2. Exposure to cloud-native PEGA deployment (Pega Cloud, AWS, Azure).
3. Knowledge of DevOps practices, CICD, and version control tools (e.g., Git, Jenkins).
4. Familiarity with robotic process automation (RPA) within PEGA.

title: Java Software Engineer IRC287945
description:
**Description**
 You will join a team dedicated to the Post-Order Fulfillment & Customer Experience ecosystem. Our primary goal is to provide transparency and reliability after a purchase is made. We design and maintain critical microservices responsible for real-time order tracking (accessible to both end-customers and dealers), transactional communication (email dispatch), and automated document generation (PDFs). The project operates in a modern, cloud-native environment (Kubernetes, ArgoCD), utilizing an event-driven architecture (Kafka) and the latest Java standards (17/21) to ensure high performance and scalability.
   

  

**Requirements**
 The primary objective of this role is to provide comprehensive and self-managed support for the software services that handle orders once they have been placed by the customer. The engineer will be part of a team dedicated to delivering solutions for order status tracking—accessible by both customers and dealers—as well as managing critical backend services for transactional email dispatch and automated PDF generation. This role requires balancing operational stability with the delivery of new features according to quarterly synchronization plans.
   

  

**Required Skills Set**
 Technical Proficiencies (Core Stack):
   

  

  

* Backend Development: Advanced expertise in Java 17/21 and the Spring Boot framework.
* Data Management: Proficiency in both NoSQL (MongoDB) and Relational (PostgreSQL) databases.
* Message Brokering: Experience with Kafka for handling real-time data streams and status updates.
* API Design: Strong knowledge of REST and GraphQL for efficient data querying between front-end and back-end systems.
* Orchestration & Deployment: Hands-on experience with Kubernetes and ArgoCD for managing containerized applications and GitHub Actions for implementing robust CI/CD pipelines.
* Observability: Experience with observability tools, including creating and managing dashboards, analyzing logs, and configuring alerts to ensure system reliability and performance.


**Professional & Soft Skills:**
* Self-Managed Service: Ability to work independently and take full ownership of assigned work packages.
* Collaborative Communication: Capability to coordinate with internal teams to refine features and resolve integration issues.
* Documentation: Ability to deliver technical documentation in accordance with mandatory company and industry standards


 Job responsibilities
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Order Tracking Development: Build and maintain robust solutions that allow customers and dealers to monitor order status in real-time.
* Communication Services: Own and improve microservices responsible for sending transactional emails, ensuring high deliverability and reliability.
* Order Management: Implement and maintain order search features and BFF layers for order management solutions.
* Document Generation: Manage and optimize services dedicated to the automated generation of PDF documents (e.g., order configuration, product certificate).
* System Monitoring: Monitor alerts and dashboards to ensure production services remain healthy and stable.
* Stakeholder Alignment: Engage in continuous dialogue with cross-functional teams and product management to ensure technical solutions align with broader business goals.
* Agile Reporting: Participate in daily stand-ups to present status updates and discuss possible challenges. Take part in weekly planning sessions and biweekly retrospective meetings.
* Technical Excellence: Ensure all implemented solutions are approved by technical leadership and adhere to established architectural principles and mandatory industry standards.


 What we offer
   

  

**Culture of caring.** 
 At GlobalLogic, we prioritize a culture of caring. Across every region and department, at every level, we consistently put people first. From day one, you’ll experience an inclusive culture of acceptance and belonging, where you’ll have the chance to build meaningful connections with collaborative teammates, supportive managers, and compassionate leaders.
   

  

**Learning and development.** 
 We are committed to your continuous learning and development. You’ll learn and grow daily in an environment with many opportunities to try new things, sharpen your skills, and advance your career at GlobalLogic. With our Career Navigator tool as just one example, GlobalLogic offers a rich array of programs, training curricula, and hands-on opportunities to grow personally and professionally.
   

  

**Interesting & meaningful work.** 
 GlobalLogic is known for engineering impact for and with clients around the world. As part of our team, you’ll have the chance to work on projects that matter. Each is a unique opportunity to engage your curiosity and creative problem-solving skills as you help clients reimagine what’s possible and bring new solutions to market. In the process, you’ll have the privilege of working on some of the most cutting-edge and impactful solutions shaping the world today.
   

  

**Balance and flexibility.** 
 We believe in the importance of balance and flexibility. With many functional career areas, roles, and work arrangements, you can explore ways of achieving the perfect balance between your work and life. Your life extends beyond the office, and we always do our best to help you integrate and balance the best of work and life, having fun along the way!
   

  

**High-trust organization.** 
 We are a high-trust organization where integrity is key. By joining GlobalLogic, you’re placing your trust in a safe, reliable, and ethical global company. Integrity and trust are a cornerstone of our value proposition to our employees and clients. You will find truthfulness, candor, and integrity in everything we do.
   

  

**About GlobalLogic**
 GlobalLogic, a Hitachi Group Company, is a trusted digital engineering partner to the world’s largest and most forward-thinking companies. Since 2000, we’ve been at the forefront of the digital revolution – helping create some of the most innovative and widely used digital products and experiences. Today we continue to collaborate with clients in transforming businesses and redefining industries through intelligent products, platforms, and services.

title: Senior Analytics Engineer to Alva Labs
description:
**TL;DR**
 Alva Labs is looking for a
 **Senior Analytics Engineer** 
 with strong SQL skills and experience building data pipelines and analytics models. In this role, you’ll design data models, build ELT pipelines in BigQuery, ensure data quality, and enable data that drives product and business decisions.
   

  

**Why Alva?**
 At Alva Labs, they’re redefining how companies hire — replacing gut feeling with science. They’re building an AI-first Hiring System: the only platform companies need to define roles, assess candidates, make confident decisions, and continuously improve their hiring.
   

  

 Instead of fragmented tools, they’re creating one cohesive system designed to make hiring more accurate, fair, and scalable. Leading companies across Europe already trust them to improve the quality and inclusiveness of their hiring.
   

  

 The team in Stockholm is small and ambitious, with a strong culture of ownership, velocity, and low-ego collaboration. They care deeply about their craft and about each other, and they’re driven to build something that lasts.
   

  

 Joining now means being part of an exciting growth journey as Alva Labs scales their product, explores new AI-powered capabilities, and brings fair hiring to millions more people.
   

  

**What Alva Labs Is Looking For**
* Strong technical background in data architecture, ETL processes, and data modeling
* Proficiency in SQL and experience with Python
* Experience implementing data governance practices and monitoring data quality
* Strong problem-solving skills
* Collaborative mindset — you enjoy working cross-functionally with product, design, engineers, and researchers


**Bonus If You Have**
* A track record of leading data-driven projects and initiatives
* Experience developing and executing data strategies aligned with business objectives


 Most importantly, they’re looking for someone passionate about enabling data-driven decision-making and continuously improving data infrastructure and processes.
   

  

**What You'll Do**
**In one sentence:** 
 Build data pipelines that power high-quality analytics.
   

  

* Build scalable data models and optimize ELT pipelines to power dashboards and self-serve analytics
* Ensure data quality through testing, governance, and documentation
* Collaborate closely with engineers, analysts, and business stakeholders
* Continuously improve tools and processes for scalability, performance, and reliability


**Tech Stack**
* Data Pipelines & Models: BigQuery, dbt, synq, dlt
* Dashboards & Visualization: Metabase, Lightdash
* Data Platform: Google Cloud Platform, Cloud run, Docker, terraform


**Questions and contact**
 Alva Labs is working with Amendo in this recruitment process. If you have any questions regarding this specific role, please contact Business Area Manager Johanna Hallenberg at johanna.hallenberg@amendo.se. Interviews are conducted on a rolling basis, so we encourage you to apply as soon as possible. Please submit your application in English, as it is the company language at Alva Labs
   

  

**About Amendo**
 Amendo is one of Sweden’s leading recruitment and consulting company, with a clear focus on accounting, banking, finance, insurance, IT, and tech roles and expertise. We help companies grow and people develop - we are your trusted and dedicated talent partner.
   

  

 Follow us on
 **Linkedin** 
 ,
 **Instagram** 
 and
 **Facebook** 
 .
   

  

 #IT
   

  

 Amendo har arbetat med framtidens kompetens sedan 2001 och är landets ledande konsult- och rekryteringsföretag inom ekonomi, bank, finans, försäkring, IT och tech. Vi är ett expansivt bolag verksamma över hela landet med lokala kontor i Stockholm, Göteborg och Örnsköldsvik.
   

  

 Vår vision att utveckla världen med kompetens når vi genom att arbeta nära våra kunder och kandidater, vara nyfikna på omvärlden - och hela tiden vilja framåt.
   

  

 Läs mer på amendo.se.

title: Senior SAP Solution Architect – EAM, Logistics & Digital Platforms
description:
Shape the Future of Enterprise Solutions
   

  

 Do you want to make fossil-free living possible within one generation? As Senior SAP Solution Architect – EAM, Logistics & Digital Platforms, you will design and optimize complex SAP landscapes that power Vattenfall’s operations across multiple countries. This role calls for broad, all-round technology skills and the ability to connect business needs with advanced IT solutions—while acting as a trusted advisor and consultant to our internal business teams.
   

  

 Why this role matters
   

  

 We are transforming into a data-driven organization to support our mission. Your work will enable smarter decisions, predictive maintenance, and seamless integration across SAP and related platforms. You’ll help us build secure, scalable solutions that keep our operations running smoothly—and guide our business stakeholders in making technology choices that deliver real value.
   

  

**You’ll Work On**
* Enterprise Asset Management (EAM/PM) and Logistics processes (S2C, P2P) on SAP S/4HANA
* ePPM for project and portfolio management
* Document Management Systems (DMS) and Work Clearance Management (WCM)
* Integration strategies for hybrid SAP landscapes (cloud and on-premise)
* Supporting financial processes with a general understanding of CO Controlling


 Your responsibilities
   

  

* Guide strategic projects with fit-for-purpose architecture
* Act as an internal consultant: advise business stakeholders on SAP strategy, integration, and data architecture
* Ensure IT security compliance and support adoption of IEC 62443, ISO27001 standards
* Develop architecture principles and standards for enterprise-wide solutions
* Be a trusted advisor to enable operating models through technology


**Qualifications**
 You combine technical depth with business insight and thrive in complex environments. Ideally, you bring:
   

  

* Academic degree in IT or related field
* Hands-on experience as SAP Solution Architect in asset-intensive industries (energy, utilities, manufacturing)
* Strong knowledge of SAP S/4HANA, EAM (PM), ePPM, Logistics (S2C, P2P), DMS, WCM
* General understanding of CO Controlling
* Familiarity with Microsoft Azure Well-Architected Framework
* Experience with security frameworks and critical infrastructure requirements
* Fluent in Swedish and English


 Additional Information
   

  

**What We Offer**
* A chance to shape solutions critical to Vattenfall’s operations
* Work with a team of senior architects on high-impact projects
* Flexible working arrangements and a healthy work-life balance
* Opportunities for professional growth and development
* A central office location with easy access by public transport
* Be part of an international, diverse, and motivated team


**Why you’ll love this job**
* Impact at scale: Your solutions will support thousands of users across multiple countries and help accelerate the energy transition.
* Consulting with purpose: Combine your technical expertise with advisory skills to influence business decisions and shape future operating models.


**About Vattenfall**
 We are one of Europe’s largest producers and retailers of electricity and heat. Our mission: make fossil-free living possible within one generation. With 20,000 colleagues across multiple countries, we power homes, industries, and innovation.
   

  

**Ready to apply?**
 Submit your application in English, including CV and cover letter, via our website.
   

  

**Company Description**
 Vattenfall is one of Europe’s largest producers and retailers of electricity and heat. Our main markets are Sweden, Germany, the Netherlands, Denmark, and the UK. The Vattenfall Group has approximately 20,000 employees. We have been electrifying industries, powering homes and transforming life through innovation for more than 100 years. We now want to make fossil free living possible within one generation and we are driving the transition to a sustainable energy system.

title: Product Owner
description:
Description


Welcome to SSC Space (formerly Swedish Space Corporation), the perfect workplace for those passionate about technology in general and space in particular.
With space organizations, research institutes, institutional and commercial actors as customers, we offer specialist expertise in satellite communications, spacecraft consulting services, rocket and balloon systems, and much more.


SSC Space also has one of the world’s largest global networks of ground stations for satellite communications. We own and operate the Esrange Space Center in Kiruna, northern Sweden, with the aim of launching satellites in the near future.

**Are you fueled by a passion for people and the ambition to create an awesome workplace?**  

**Are you ready to embark on an exciting journey with us to help Earth benefit from space?**


If you answer yes to these questions, we invite you to seize the opportunity to make a significant impact as a Product Owner in our unit. We are looking for a dedicated personwho shares our core values of Customer passion, Care, Collaboration, Curiosity, and Courage.


Requirements


To succeed in this role, you need experience with agile methodologies, be skilled at leading teams, and excel at interacting with various stakeholders across the organization.
We will teach you what you need to know about the satellite business and our Monitoring & Control systems, but you need to bring curiosity and a drive to learn and grow.


We believe you have:

* 3+ years of Product ownership and or Scrum master experience in an Agile development environment
* Master’s or PhD degree in a technical field or have corresponding experience.

  

This position requires a European citizenship and occasional travelling within and outside Sweden.
Responsibilities


We offer the opportunity to join the Software unit within SSC Connect, which is entrusted to develop and maintain critical systems required to connect our customers with their satellites.
As a Product Owner you will own the vision and roadmap for our Core products and support our Monitoring & Control teams with direction and prioritization. You’ll be instrumental in defining the future of our Core products as we advance to the next generation of our tech stack.

**Examples of responsibilities:**

* Define and communicate the product vision.
* Perform backlog refinement and drive product increment planning.
* Collaborate with architects and other stakeholders to clarify and deliver project requirements.
* Keep track of data and monitor KPIs to enable data-driven decision-making.
* Bridge business stakeholders and the development team, ensuring that the product aligns with business goals, meets user needs, and adapts to changing requirements.
* Collaborate closely with the software teams.


Benefits


**WE OFFER YOU*** A unique opportunity to contribute to a wide range of projects and play an active role in both the Swedish and international space industry.
* An excellent opportunity for personal and career development.
* An exciting, international workplace characterized by an open atmosphere and proud employees all over the world.
**Additional benefits*** In addition to vacation and traditional public holidays, we offer extra paid leave throughout the year, such as time off between Christmas and New Year, Ascension Day, amounting to 6-11 extra days depending on the calendar.
* Wellness allowance of SEK 5,000 per year.
* Health benefits such as voluntary health insurance and regular health checks for eligible employees.
* Access to a benefit bike through a tax-efficient leasing program.
* Support for employee-driven activities that promote connection, health, and culture across teams.
* Collective Agreement, including good pensions plans, parental pay and insurance.

 **LOCATION**


This is a full-time, permanent position based at our office in either Solna or Kiruna.

 **FURTHER INFORMATION**


For questions regarding the position, you are welcome to contact:  

**Jenny Rudenstål, Head of Software Systems** jenny.rudenstal@sscspace.com


For questions regarding employment terms or union-related matters, you are welcome to contact our union representatives:  

**Sveriges Ingenjörer**: SverigesIngenjorer-AF@sscspace.com  

**Unionen**: unionen@sscspace.com

**Please note that we only consider applications submitted through our official careers page. Applications sent via other channels will not be processed.** **NEXT STEP**


If this opportunity sparks your interest, we encourage you to apply as soon as possible! We review applications continuously and will conduct interviews throughout the process.


You can submit your application up until 2026-04-12, which is the latest possible date for consideration. Please note, however, that the position may be filled before this date, and the advertisement may therefore close earlier. This allows us to manage the process efficiently and give each application the attention it deserves.


When applying, please include your CV. While you are welcome to include a brief personal note or letter, our evaluation will primarily focus on your skills and qualifications as outlined in your CV, ensuring a fair and unbiased recruitment process.  

  

This position requires approved pre-employment screening. These controls are based on the role that you will fulfill within the company. Additional requirements regarding citizenship may apply.

  

**WE HELP EARTH BENEFIT FROM SPACE**


SSC Space is a leading global provider of advanced space services, with more than 50 years of experience. We help space organizations, research institutes, commercial and institutional actors from all over the world to get access to space.


With local presence on all continents and about 750 committed employees, we offer specialist expertise in satellite communications and satellite control services, spacecraft operations, rocket and balloon systems, launch services and flight test services, as well as engineering, operations and consultancy services for space missions.


 We help Earth benefit from Space. Learn more at sscspace.com

title: System and Application Engineer
description:
Job Description
Job Title: System and Application Engineer
Req ID: 48325
Job Location (Short): Almhult, SWE | Goteborg, SWE | Stockholm, SWE
Employment Type: Full Time
Segment: Danfoss Power Solutions Segment
Job Category: Sales
Work Location Type: Hybrid
**The Impact You'll Make**
--------------------------

W ant to bec ome a **System & Application Engineer** based in **Stockholm, Göteborg or Älmhult?**

Then join Danfoss and you’ll be the go- to expert for our customers, helping them bring their off-highway machines to life using Danfoss Power Solutions’ hydraulic and electronic control products. Y ou’ll play a key role in shaping innovative solutions and making sure they work in the real world and be part of a strong community of engineers who support each other and share knowledge across Europe.


**What You’ll Be Doing**
------------------------

* Supporting customers with hydraulic , control and software (PLUS+1®) solutions for off-highway applications specifying our products.
* Designing and sizing hydraulic systems and software proof-of-concept solutions based on customer needs.
* Testing and tuning machines on-site or at our Application Development Centre in Denmark
* Delivering technical training and presentations to help customers get the most out of our products
**What We're Looking For**
--------------------------

* Degree in engineering (Mechatronics, Electrical, Mechanical, or similar) and knowledge of hydraulic systems
* Background in Electrification or in the Mobile Off-Highway Industry as well as ideally some hands-on experience from a previous role
* Curious and collaborative mindset and a passion for learning and improving
* Fluent communication skills in Swedish and English
* A “can do” attitude with the drive to make things happen and solve problems quickly.
Willingness to travel; mostly nationally and occasional international trips (ca. 50 days per year)  
* 

For further questions, please reach out to Friederike Gottwald, Talent Acquisition Partner, at +49 40 7367 5131.


**What You'll Get from Us**
---------------------------

* We promote from within and support your learning with mentoring, training, and access to global opportunities.
* You’ll have flexibility, autonomy, and support to do your best work while maintaining a healthy work-life balance. Your well-being matters to us.
* We strive to create an inclusive work environment where people of all backgrounds are respected, and valued for who they are.
* You’ll receive benefits like 13th salary, annual bonus, paid vacation, pension plans, personal insurance, and more. These vary by country and contract, but they’re worth asking about—we think they’re pretty great.
**Ready to Make a Difference?**
-------------------------------

If this role excites you, we’d love to hear from you! to start the conversation and learn more about where your career can go with us.

Danfoss engineers solutions that increase machine productivity, reduce emissions, lower energy consumption, and enable electrification.

title: System Safety Engineer
description:
Blue Eye AB as an Automotive Product Development & Engineering consulting company. We carry our experience and knowledge with the best professionals in different disciplines to offer optimal solutions against our client requirements for complete Vehicle R&D. As an employee or a sub-contractor, working within the Blue Eye work frameagreement, We encourage you to share your ideas and experiences. This enables our teams to increase their knowledge and deliver high quality product development as well as strengthen our competitiveness as a company.


### **Description**


At Blue eye Engineering AB, we are more than just an engineering talent supplier; we provide the foundation and stepping stones for your future development in automotive engineering industry.  

Established in 2016, our mission has been clear: to support our Global automotive R&D clients by managing highly talented & qualified engineering consultants Internationally & Locally to satisfy the needs. We have open position for **"System Safety Engineer"** to work for a premium electric car brand in Gothenburg-Sweden

### **Tasks**


The activities cover the complete development cycle, for example, functional safety impact analysis, hazard analysis and risk assessment, functional and technical safety concepts, validation and verification, safety case, system safety joint reviews with suppliers and verification reviews. Note that the position may require travelling (several times per year) to China.


* Lead and perform functional safety activities across vehicle and platform projects in accordance with ISO 26262, including HARA, FSC, TSC and safety analyses (FTA, FMEA).
* Develop, maintain and defend the Safety Case, ensuring end-to-end traceability from safety goals to implementation and verification.
* Perform verification, confirmation and technical reviews of safety work products and safety-relevant concepts.
* Drive ASIL decomposition strategies and support safety release and milestone gates.
* Lead and support System Safety Joint Reviews with suppliers, challenging safety argumentation

where required.
  

* Contribute to functional safety planning, governance and continuous improvement of processes,

guidelines and templates.### **Qualifications**

* 5+ years of hands-on functional safety experience within automotive, including vehicle and

platform-level development.
  

* Proven ability to independently lead and drive ISO 26262 activities end-to-end (HARA, FSC,

TSC, ASIL allocation/decomposition, Safety Case and safety release).
  

* Strong experience building, structuring and defending Safety Case towards internal

stakeholders, suppliers and review boards.
  

* Demonstrated capability to technically challenge suppliers and secure robust safety

argumentation in safety-critical development.
  

* Solid understanding of modern E/E architectures and software-intensive systems (e.g. central

compute, domain or zonal architectures).
  

* Experience leading safety analyses (FTA, FMEA) and defining safety mechanisms in HW and

SW.
**Meritorious**  

* Experience acting as safety lead or safety responsible in vehicle/platform programs.
* Knowledge of ISO 21448 (SOTIF) and interaction between Functional Safety and

Cybersecurity.
  

* Experience from ADAS/AD, electrified platforms or cross-regional (EU–China) development

environments.
### **Terms**


We will review your application and see how your profile matches our requirements for this role. If you proceed to the next step in this process you will be contacted in the near future. We will of course also let you know, as soon as possible, if your profile isn’t exactly what we are looking for at the moment.We strive to continuously improve and to provide a positive hiring experience for all our candidates.

title: Mjukvaru- och testutvecklare för inbyggda system
description:
### **JOB DESCRIPTION**



Just nu säker vi **Mjukvaru- och testutvecklare** för inbyggda system!  



**Din roll**

Vill du få vara en nyckelspelare i utvecklingsprocessen?
  

Hos oss får du varierade arbetsuppgifter och är delaktig i kravanalys, design, implementation och verifiering, samt felsökning under produktens livscykel. I din roll kan uppgifterna handla om alltifrån drivrutiner till operativsystem och avancerad applikationsmjukvara. Vi använder oss av programmeringsspråket C (alternativt C++/Ada/Python) oftast för Power PC-processorer, ARM eller DSPer. Till en början kommer du främst att arbeta med implementation och test av SW för att komma in i våra processer och metoder. Efterhand kommer du få ta ett större ansvar! I tjänsten kan enstaka resor både nationellt och internationellt förekomma.


### **BASIC QUALIFICATIONS**



**Din profil**

Vi tror att du som trivs bäst i denna roll är en kreativ lagspelare som uppskattar struktur och god kommunikation. Du är nyfiken på ny teknik och trivs i en miljö som kännetecknas av våra värderingar kunskap, vilja och förtroende. Du är ingenjör och har minst en högskoleutbildning, gärna med inriktning mot inbyggda system och HW-nära programmering. Du behärskar svenska och engelska i såväl tal som skrift obehindrat.



För tjänsten krävs kunskap inom:
  

• Inbyggda system
  

• C-programmering  



### **PREFERRED ADDITIONAL SKILLS, PERSONAL TRAITS AND EXPERIENCE**



**Det är meriterande med kunskap inom:**



• Säkerhetskritiska system
  

• C++, Ada, Assembler och script-språk t.ex. Python
  

• Realtids OS
  

• UML
  

• Jira/Bitbucket/Confluence

description:

Dags för nya kollegor? Vi söker dig med några till flera års erfarenhet som elektronikingenjör inom hårdvaruutveckling.



Som person tycker du utveckling, felsökning och konstruktion av elektronikhårdvara är det bästa att jobba med. Du har djup förståelse för komponenter, PCB-design och Elektronik-cad i något av de ledande systemen.



Vi på Sigma Industry Evolution är ingenjörsföretaget som erbjuder konsulter till både de mindre och större företagen.


### **BASIC QUALIFICATIONS**


* Du har en högskole- eller civilingenjörsexamen inom elektro eller motsvarande.
* Erfarenhet av att konstruera elektronikhårdvara
* Erfarenhet av certifiering
* Erfarenhet av schematics/design

Som person är du tillmötesgående och gillar teknik. Att ha en förståelse för kundens önskan och teknikens möjligheter är en viktig del i arbetet som teknisk konsult på Sigma.


### **WE OFFER**



Vårt erbjuder en möjlighet att få vara med och bygga upp ett företag i framkant.


* En flexibel arbetsdag

title: Data Center Critical Facilities Engineer
description:
### **Data Center Critical Facilities Engineer**


* JR-158945
* Stockholm
* Operations
* Full time

**Who are we?**



Equinix is the world’s digital infrastructure company®, shortening the path to connectivity to enable the innovations that enrich our work, life and planet.

  


A place where bold ideas are welcomed, human connection is valued, and everyone has the opportunity to shape their future.



Joining our operations team means being at the center of everything – maintaining and evolving critical infrastructure that powers the digital world and delivers real impact for our customers, communities and society. You’ll find belonging, purpose, and a team that welcomes you—because when you feel valued, you’re empowered to do your best work.**Job Summary**


The Critical Facilities Engineer operates, manages, maintains, and repairs HVAC systems, critical and non‑critical power systems, plumbing, fire control and suppression systems, roofing, exterior grounds, and all related vendor-supported activities within a mission‑critical environment.


This fast‑paced role supports overall Data Center operations by maintaining and improving critical infrastructure through scheduled maintenance and ad hoc repairs and troubleshooting.

*Leadership & Operational Excellence*  

Demonstrate strong technical leadership by building an engaged, confident team and maintaining clear operational oversight. Provide weekly management updates on preventive maintenance, corrective actions, risks, and upcoming work.


Proactively plan and lead engineering drills (Engineering Response, Bridge Communication, Environmental), review proactive vendor reports, and conduct regular team meetings to address challenges, lessons learned, and improvements.


Maintain full ownership of the change management process by submitting and reviewing change requests within the agreed customer notice period, ensuring timely approvals, thorough risk assessments, MOP creation and effective coordination with stakeholders and vendors to support safe, compliant, and resilient operations.

**Responsibilities**

*Regular Infrastructure Maintenance*

* Completes all maintenance protocols, plans, etc. on time and accurately, including daily, weekly and monthly site checks
* Performs all planned repairs to mechanical, electrical and special systems
* Makes minor changes to mechanical, electrical and special systems if necessary
* Troubleshoot and maintain office equipment if necessary, supporting auxiliary equipment and machines with problem solving and minor repairs to minimize downtime
* Addresses, reports, resolves and investigates all major failures, significant problems, and delays
* Ensures that sufficient spare parts are available on site for frequently used parts or parts with long lead times and maintains critical spares register
* Monitors for and responds to BMS (Building Monitoring System) alarms in accordance with engineering policies and procedures
* Maintains plumbing and fire suppression systems

*Vendor Management*

* Coordinates with vendors to ensure that maintenance activities are carried out as per Equinix's requirements
* Edits and tracks the work approval process for service providers (including briefing at the start of work, control of work during the day, final review of the work carried out)
* Recommend changes/updates to technical files for plants and equipment in cooperation with vendor, and the supervisors, ensuring as-built are up to date

*Process and Policy Administration*

* Creates engineering scripts (switching schedules)
* Ensures that all Equinix safety standards are followed
* Ensures that quality procedures related to maintenance are followed
* Ensures correct Incident Management processes are followed
* Reviews processes, procedures, systems. Communicates process deviations and proposed changes to a higher level so that relevant follow-up measures can be carried out
* Develops training and supports training of other Data Center (International Business Exchange) employees in relevant engineering topics and processes

**Qualifications**

*Knowledge and Experience*

* Understanding of relevant codes, compliance regulations, and applicable safe work requirements
* Familiar with common documents as it applies to design, documents, schemes, data sheets, and technical information
* Relevant experience may include:
* Building (Facility) Maintenance with experience working in large commercial properties such as a high rise building or a convention center
* Maintenance technicians working in critical environments such as a hospital, hotel, or manufacturing plant where it’s critical if you lose power or the AC or heating unit goes down
* General mechanical experience such as Generator Repair, Auto Mechanic, Aircraft Mechanic, Electrician, HVAC Technician, etc.
* Refrigeration handling certification preferred, electrical/mechanical license preferred

*Skills and Attributes*


Essential Duties/Physical specifications include:

* Able to perform all essential job functions, including walking, standing, bending, stooping, climbing, lifting and manual dexterity, with or without reasonable accommodation
* Ability to work days/nights/weekends/holidays, if needed and/or required
* Familiar with all common applications needed to perform daily tasks, including CMMS, CRMs, productivity software, and draft drawing softwares
* Skilled at working in alignment with all relevant safety measures
* Skilled at communicating with and managing vendors
* Able to communicate effectively with others, including oral and written instructions and reporting
* Excellent problem solving and teamwork skills


Equinix is committed to ensuring that our employment process is open to all individuals, including those with a disability. If you are a qualified candidate and need assistance or an accommodation, please let us know by completing form.


Equinix is an Equal Employment Opportunity and, in the U.S., an Affirmative Action employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to unlawful consideration of race, color, religion, creed, national or ethnic origin, ancestry, place of birth, citizenship, sex, pregnancy / childbirth or related medical conditions, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, marital or domestic partnership status, age, veteran or military status, physical or mental disability, medical condition, genetic information, political / organizational affiliation, status as a victim or family member of a victim of crime or abuse, or any other status protected by applicable law.

**We use artificial intelligence in our hiring process. Learn more** **here****.**
company_description: Equinix (Nasdaq: EQIX) is the world’s digital infrastructure company®.

title: Temporary position: Research Scientist - ABB Robotics Software (end date 2026-12-31)
description:
At ABB, we help industries outrun - leaner and cleaner. Here, progress is an expectation - for you, your team, and the world. As a global market leader, we’ll give you what you need to make it happen. It won’t always be easy, growing takes grit. But at ABB, you’ll never run alone. Run what runs the world.


This role sits within ABB's Robotics business, a leading global robotics company. We're entering an exciting new chapter as we’ve announced the plan for SoftBank Group to acquire ABB Robotics. SoftBank is a globally recognized technology group and investor/operator focused on AI, robotics, and next-generation computing. By joining us now, you’ll be part of a pioneering team shaping the future of robotics—working alongside world-class experts in a fast-moving, innovation-driven environment.


This Position reports to:


R&D Team Lead**Your role and responsibilities**
----------------------------------


In this role, you will have the opportunity to contribute to ABB's success with technology, software, product, and system development. Each day, you will identify and implement innovative solutions to relevant problems. You will also showcase your expertise by providing ideas and by being able to work both independently and as a part of a Research & Development (R&D) team.  

  

This is a temporarily employed position, reports to Robotics research team manager. You will be mainly accountable for:

* You will be part of creating new technologies that are crucial for the factory-of-the-future in discrete manufacturing. More specifically, the focus will be mainly in software development for autonomous robots using computer vision and artificial intelligence.
* The candidate is expected to have in-depth knowledge and rich experience in implementing software into robotics systems, to explore autonomous robot manipulation scenarios under semi-structured environment.
* This requires good theoretical knowledge and experience in the fields of software engineering, artificial intelligence and machine learning. Good understanding in robot applications both in simulation and with real robots.
* You are expected to drive specific activities to successful conclusion while following a visionary continuity in your work. To succeed in this position, you should be capable of working both independently and in a team. You will be working in an international environment. It is therefore required that you have good communication skills in English.

 *Our team dynamics*  

You will join a collaborative, innovative, talented and high performing team, where you will be able to thrive.

**Qualifications for the role**
-------------------------------

* Have a MSc or PhD degree of education in the subjects of robotics, computer science or artificial intelligence.
* 2-5 years experience in developing software for robotics or computer vision is required.
* Demonstrated experience working in robotics, either in simulation or with physical robots.
* Demonstrated experience working on computer vision.
* Knowledge and experience with ROS 2 is considered an advantage.
* Deep knowledge in Linux (Ubuntu) is considered an advantage.
* Knowledge of modern software development practices such as git/agile/continuous integration is considered an advantage..
**More about us**
-----------------


You will be part of the research team at ABB Robotics in Västerås, Sweden. In our role as ABB Robotics Research, we ensure ABB Robotics' technology competitiveness now and in future.

  

In the Robotics research team we focus on mechatronics concepts, design and robot intelligence in both industrial and service robot segments. Our research activities usually formulated as technology pre-study and technology development projects. We work closely with ABB's robotics business to ensure our research will bring unique value for ABB Robotics. At the same time, we have close collaboration with academic world to bridge the academic and industrial research. In this team, one of our historical highlights is the creation and development of the dual-arm YuMi robot concept and the mobile YuMi concept.


Recruiting Manager, LiWei Qi, +46 730 21 23 09, will answer your questions about the position. Union representatives – Sveriges Ingenjörer: Pia Sandström, +4672 525 90 30; Ledarna: Lenny Larsson, +46 706 32 85 47; Unionen: Roger L. Gustavsson, +46 730 30 30 36.


The last day to apply is April 3. We look forward to reviewing your application!


Please note that to be eligible for employment at ABB Robotics Sweden AB, you will need to pass our pre-employment screening steps. This includes a reference check, a drug test, and could also include an extended background check.


We kindly decline any direct contact with staffing and recruitment agencies as well as sellers of additional job advertisements.


We value people from different backgrounds. Could this be your story? Apply today or visit www.abb.com to read more about us and learn about the impact of our solutions across the globe.

title: Quality Technician
description:
Why Join Us?
We’re on a mission to empower people with disabilities to do what they once did or never thought possible. As the world-leader in assistive communication solutions, we empower our customers to express themselves, connect with the world, and live richer lives.  

At Tobii Dynavox, you can grow your career within a dynamic, global company that has a clear, impactful purpose - with the flexibility to also do what truly matters to you outside of work. What’s more, you’ll be part of a work culture where collaboration is the norm and individuality is welcomed.  

As a member of our team, you’ll have the power to grow ideas in an unconventional environment. At the same time, you’ll work in a culture of ongoing learning and development, allowing you to constantly expand your area of expertise.
About the role:
As a Quality Technician, you will join our Global Quality & Regulatory team and play a key role in maintaining high-quality standards across logistics,production, repairs, and rental operations. You will focus on three main areas: quality control, quality investigations, and continuous improvement. You will help ensure that our medical devices are compliant with regulatory requirements and Tobii Dynavox standards and delivered safe through hands-on quality control, problem‑solving, and continuous improvement activities.
This is a hands‑on role where you will work analytically and practically — questioning how things function, verifying usability, identifying issues, and ensuring they are corrected and prevented from recurring.
Please note: This is a full‑time and onsite role based at our Stockholm office in Östermalm.  

In this role you will:* Perform daily quality control activities (i.e. Incoming Quality Control (IQC) and in‑process inspections) and oversee equipment calibration schedules to ensure tools meet regulatory and calibration standards.
* Investigate and resolve non‑conformances and deviations through CAPA, root‑cause analysis and effectiveness checks and ensure ESD compliance through procedures, measurements, and proper handling of sensitive components.
* Analyse logistics, production and service data to identify trends and drive quality improvements and conduct risk assessments and pFMEAs to mitigate quality and operational risks.
* Develop, update, and implement SOPs, inspection protocols, and work instructions, and deliver training to logistics, production and repair teams on quality procedures.
* Support validation activities (IQ/OQ/PQ) through data collection and protocol development, and assist with internal audits, audit readiness, and compliance with ISO 13485 and MDR.
* Participate in process change control and support cross-functional quality projects, while contributing to Lean and Kaizen initiatives for continuous improvement.


What We’re Looking For
We’re looking for an organized, adaptable, and solution‑oriented professional with strong attention to detail and a clear focus on quality, compliance, and continuous improvement. You learn quickly, take ownership from issue detection through resolution, and communicate clearly when working cross-functionally. You are comfortable working with both hardware and software, and you bring a confident, approachable, and collaborative style when interacting with others. You do not need to be a senior‑level engineer; what matters is your ability to troubleshoot, think logically, follow structured processes.
Ideal candidates will bring:* Bachelor’s degree in engineering, Life Sciences, or technical discipline or equivalent experience.
* At least 3 years of experience in quality-related roles within a regulated environment, preferably in medical devices or electronics industries.
* Experience with inspection tools, electronic test equipment, and calibration processes.
* Understanding of non‑conformance handling (i.e. investigations, root‑cause analysis, CAPA, documentation).
* Experience with ERP (e.g., Dynamics 365) and QMS systems is a plus.
* Experience or knowledge of ISO 13485, MDR, and ISO 14971 is a plus.
* Excellent problem-solving, troubleshooting and communication skills as well as fluency in English, both written and spoken, to proactively collaborate cross-functionally and with both internal external stakeholders.


Apply today!
We believe in empowering individuals - including our own employees - to reach their full potential. So, if you want to change lives while growing your own career, we’d love to hear from you.
Where we stand:
We believe diversity not only enriches our workplace culture, but also gives us a strategic advantage. Working with people from a variety of backgrounds and perspectives helps us all become better communicators, better problem solvers, and better human beings. Our differences make us stronger.
Tobii Dynavox values equality of opportunity, human dignity, and racial/ethnic and cultural diversity. Tobii Dynavox does not discriminate against individuals on the basis of race, color, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, religion, disability, age, veteran status, ancestry, or national or ethnic origin.  

Equal Opportunity Employer/AA Women/Minorities/Veterans/Disabled
